title: Hamilton Beach Electric Coffee Grinder for Beans, Spices and More, with Multiple Grind Settings for up to 14 Cups, Removable Stainless Steel Chamber, Grey (80396C), 10 oz
description:
About this item
CONVENIENTLY GRIND COFFEE HANDS-FREE: Just press the button once, and coffee grinds while your hands are free to handle other chores in the kitchen or to take a break. When grinding is complete, the electric coffee grinder shuts off automatically.
ADJUSTABLE GRIND CONTROL: Whether you like your coffee finely or coarsely ground, simply turn the adjustable knob on the coffee bean grinder to choose your setting. Select from 5 settings, from coarse to medium to fine.
GRIND ENOUGH FOR 4 TO 14 CUPS: Whether you're grinding coffee for a quick cup or a full pot, we've got you covered. Just move the lever up or down to easily select the number of cups you plan to make. Grind enough coffee beans for 4 to 14 cups of coffee.
EASY TO CLEAN & POUR, WITH REMOVABLE BOWL: Cleaning is easy with our dishwasher safe, removable grinding bowl designed with durable stainless steel. Because the bowl is removable, it's also easy to fill with coffee beans and to pour ground coffee.
EFFICIENTLY GRIND COFFEE & MORE: With the durable stainless steel blades, this small coffee grinder makes easy work of grinding everything from coffee beans to herbs and spices.
Convenient hidden cord storage - just snap open, wind the cord inside & close
reviews_5s:
I couldn’t be happier. This was my third attempt at getting an inexpensive coffee grinder. Two others went back, this one is not only a keeper, It’s exceeded my expectations by far, and at a surprisingly low price.

It has a deep well in which to put beans, almost 3 times the size of any other compact grinder, all three of which I sent back because they could barely grind enough for 3 cups. This one can easily grind for up to 14 cups at once.

There are 5 settings from fine all the way to course grinding. Then you select the amount of beans you’re grinding. And it’s all automatic from there, one button and watch it work. It automatically turns off when it’s done.

The Coarse to medium to fine actually sets the speed of the grinder, and the number of cups you select automatically sets a timer.

If that seems impossibly simple, I’m telling you it works incredibly well. I’ve already tried varying amounts of beans and settings from course to fine, and the thing performs flawlessly, gave me exactly what I wanted. It really blew my mind.

It’s also the first kitchen appliance where the claim of “hidden cord is “is actually true. It’s super clever, the base easily pops straight down one inch and you wind the cord around the inside, then close the base and the thing is all tidy. The cord is truly out of sight. The ability to clean is excellent, the grinding chamber comes out with a twist and a lift, and can be cleaned with soapy water. It can also be used for spices, although I haven’t tried it, but with the multitude of settings I’m sure it’s excellent. This one’s a winner.This is my second one of these and they both work great. I especially like that you just push the button and it stops grinding automatically based on your courseness setting. They clean real easily. I have never had any problem with either one. The first one has lasted years and still works as well as it did the first day.The coffee grinder works well for grinding coffee beans and other spices. It grinds quickly to the desired size and it is easy to use. It doesn’t take up very much space and the noise level isn’t extremely loud. It is a valuable addition to my kitchen.The Hamilton Beach electric coffee grinder is fantastic. It grinds beans quickly and evenly, allowing me to enjoy fresh coffee in minutes. The design is straightforward and easy to use; you just press a button. I also like that I can adjust the amount of coffee I want to grind. It's easy to clean and takes up little space in the kitchen. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who enjoys a good cup of coffee.This grinder is pure delight, in every way it could possibly be. It is so well designed, where do I even begin? It is clean and tidy, for one. The electrical cord smartly stows away in a hidden, retractable base area. Similarly, a handy cleaning brush for the blade tucks away flush against the back side of the unit, hidden but always available. The grinds are contained in the stainless steel cup, which is easily removable, for clean pours. No grinds ANYWHERE where they shouldn't be, after months of use. It just keeps itself and the surrounding area clean. It is much quieter than any other grinder I've ever had, and the grinds are as consistent and precise as expected. The dials are simple, easy to use, stylish. Freaking love this. You will too.For perspective on capacity, if you are grinding coffee to brew a large pot, this would take more than one round. It's a little messy, or I am, haven't figured out which applies. Nothing negative, works as expected.Rating: ★★★★★ (5/5)

As a coffee enthusiast, finding the right coffee grinder can significantly impact the quality of your daily brew. The coffee grinder I recently acquired has been a game-changer in my quest for the perfect cup of coffee. Here's why I'm thoroughly impressed:

Grinding Consistency: ★★★★★ (5/5)

The standout feature of this coffee grinder is its exceptional grinding consistency. Whether you prefer a coarse grind for French press or a fine grind for espresso, this grinder delivers a uniform grind size that's crucial for brewing consistency and flavor extraction. Say goodbye to uneven coffee grounds that lead to under-extraction or bitter over-extraction.

Adjustability & Versatility: ★★★★★ (5/5)

This grinder offers a wide range of grind settings, allowing you to tailor your coffee to your preferred brewing method. From cold brew to pour-over, it accommodates them all. The intuitive grind adjustment knob is easy to use and provides precise control over the grind size.

Build Quality & Durability: ★★★★★ (5/5)

Crafted from high-quality materials, this coffee grinder feels robust and well-built. The burr grinding mechanism is made to last, ensuring durability and consistent performance over time. It's evident that this grinder is built to withstand the daily grind (pun intended).

Noise Level: ★★★★☆ (4/5)

While this grinder is relatively quiet compared to some other coffee grinders, it still emits a moderate amount of noise during operation. It's not overly disruptive, but it's something to consider if you value a quieter morning routine.

Ease of Cleaning: ★★★★★ (5/5)

Cleaning this coffee grinder is a breeze. The easily removable parts and straightforward design make it simple to disassemble and clean thoroughly. Regular cleaning ensures that there's no residue buildup, maintaining the grinder's performance.

Size & Portability: ★★★★☆ (4/5)

The grinder strikes a good balance between size and portability. It's compact enough to fit on your countertop without taking up too much space, yet it's also portable if you want to take it on your travels or to your office for fresh coffee on the go.

Value for Money: ★★★★★ (5/5)

Considering the quality of coffee it produces, the grind consistency, and the durability, this coffee grinder offers excellent value for the price. It's a worthy investment for any coffee lover who's serious about the art of coffee brewing.

In summary, the coffee grinder has exceeded my expectations in every aspect. Its grind consistency, adjustability, durability, and ease of cleaning make it an indispensable tool for coffee enthusiasts. Whether you're a casual coffee drinker or a dedicated home barista, this grinder will elevate your coffee game and help you achieve the perfect brew every time. Say goodbye to pre-ground coffee and savor the rich flavors and aromas of freshly ground beans.The best coffee grinder on the market! I love it!Can’t beat it for the money. Does a great job grinding coffee.I have never sued a coffee grinder in my life until now. I’ve been trying to make my own iced coffee at home, and this was a necessity in order to do so. It grinds up coffee beans to a specific course level of your preference. It grinds them quick. It’s pretty quiet and easy to use. I’d recommend this product if a friend asked!
reviews_1s:
I really liked this coffee grinder when it first arrived. It was exactly what I wanted. The grinding cup comes out easily, and cleans easily. I found it a little difficult to lock and unlock the top cap, but could overlook that. I like the cord storage in the bottom. The grinder didn't seem to be a cheap, lightweight waste of money. I love the convenience of setting the grind, pushing the button, and letting it do its thing. The one I had for years I had to hold down the button for the cycle. The reason for the low rating, and why I can't recommend this unit: After about a dozen uses, I noticed four cracks in the body. Two of them begin just below where the grinding chamber sets; the other two -- one begins below the on/off button and extends to the number selector, the other begins at the bottom of the number selector and goes to the bottom of the unit. None of the cracks are huge... yet.I loved the way this worked. But I think I used it maybe 5 times, and it went completely dead. Could just be a fluke, but I would expect it to last longer than it did for sure.The flimsy lid broke in 2 months!! This is just a very low-quality build. I reached out to customer service a week ago but haven't heard back.

Without the lid, the unit is non-functional, AKA worthless.We tried very hard, there is no way to put it back. We ordered another one, it has the same issue. The original version was better. Very disappointed.This thing is so loud I need to run it in the garage so I don't wake up everyone in the house! It's been same since I got it. Blade is out of ballance. Not bent just not centered and not adjustable.OMG, I just attempted to use the grinder moments ago. Within seconds I wasn't able to put the top in the right position and am still struggling with that. NEVER had such problems before. The grinder was recommended highly by a friend and I trust she doesn't have any issues with it, but it doesn't work for me and I will be returning it asap. I am so upset with the loss of time, it's the last thing I want to do with my time.I bought this grinder and it broke within a year with little uses, and caused circuit shortage. Hamilton told me that they can send a new one but I have to pay for $14.99 for shipping.Spontaneously stopped working after a few months of use, without any discernible cause. I didn’t drop it or damage the cord, and yet one day—only a few months after I purchased this—it just wouldn’t work.This is my second one of these grinders. The first has a red ring and black case and is quiet and does not vibrate. I just got a gray one in the mail and it vibrates and is so loud my ears are ringing. It feels like there is a different motor in the gray one because when you hit the button the motor rotation wants to spin the grinder on the counter if your not holding it. I don’t know if my video of the two together captures the loudness but believe me in person you would think someone is using a buzzsaw.At first, there was a few times that when I would press the button to grind the coffee, nothing would happen so I would clean out the whole thing top to bottom, then it would work. after that fix stopped working I would have to hold a hand down on the top part for it to turn on. I thought that since that was the fix, then the problem had to be with the latching part. I kept trying to clean it and it still wouldn't work problem. After a few weeks of having to hold a hand down on the lid, it has decided to stop working entirely. I've tried everything and it just doesn't work anymore. I clean the thing religiously, the whole thing after every other use. I do everything I can to get coffee grounds out from all the little places. Nothing works. Works if you need one short term, not longer than a handful of months.
